title: podman 4.0 final: new criu bug: Symbol `__rseq_offset' has different size in shared object, consider re-linking
body:
podman gating tests are failing with what looks like a criu bug:
```
✗ podman checkpoint - basic test
   (from function `is' in file /usr/share/podman/test/system/helpers.bash, line 553,
    in test file /usr/share/podman/test/system/520-checkpoint.bats, line 50)
     `is "$output" "$cid" "podman container checkpoint"' failed
   # podman rm -t 0 --all --force --ignore
   # podman ps --all --external --format {{.ID}} {{.Names}}
   # podman images --all --format {{.Repository}}:{{.Tag}} {{.ID}}
   quay.io/libpod/testimage:20210610 9f9ec7f2fdef
   # podman run -d quay.io/libpod/testimage:20210610 sh -c while :;do cat /proc/uptime; sleep 0.1;done
   6315c5a68cc09c37e6805a4a81811d3585ab41f6c504de4ba4aa000a1f5fc7a7
   # podman logs 6315c5a68cc09c37e6805a4a81811d3585ab41f6c504de4ba4aa000a1f5fc7a7
   1891.68 910.76
   1891.78 910.84
   1891.88 910.84
   # podman container checkpoint 6315c5a68cc09c37e6805a4a81811d3585ab41f6c504de4ba4aa000a1f5fc7a7
   criu: Symbol `__rseq_offset' has different size in shared object, consider re-linking
   6315c5a68cc09c37e6805a4a81811d3585ab41f6c504de4ba4aa000a1f5fc7a7
   #/vvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvv
   #|     FAIL: podman container checkpoint
   #| expected: '6315c5a68cc09c37e6805a4a81811d3585ab41f6c504de4ba4aa000a1f5fc7a7'
   #|   actual: 'criu: Symbol `__rseq_offset' has different size in shared object, consider re-linking'
   #|         > '6315c5a68cc09c37e6805a4a81811d3585ab41f6c504de4ba4aa000a1f5fc7a7'
   #\^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
```
(oddly, the very next test is also a checkpoint test -- ` ✓ podman checkpoint --export, with volumes` -- but it passes).

podman-4.0.0-10.fc36.x86_64
criu-3.16.1-7.fc36.x86_64

@adrianreber PTAL when convenient.

@containers/podman-maintainers please refile into CRIU if appropriate. I'm on PTO today, and just looking into this in my spare time.

comments.body: @rst0git can you take a look at it? You did the last CRIU rawhide build. Maybe you can find out what is going on.

I can replicate the problem locally using Fedora Rawhide container.
```
$ criu --version
criu: Symbol `__rseq_offset' has different size in shared object, consider re-linking
Version: 3.16.1
```
It looks like we need to rebuild the criu rawhide package for Fedora 37.
https://koji.fedoraproject.org/koji/buildinfo?buildID=1920226
Seems like more of a CRIU bug then a Podman one.
True; at the time I filed I suspected but could not be sure. Since there's a criu bug opened now, I'll close this one. Thanks @adrianreber and @rst0git for your prompt actions.
